metadata.rulesText: Each player sacrifices all colored permanents he or she controls.
metadata.flavorText:
"The emergence of the Eldrazi isn't necessarily a bad thing, as long as you've already lived a fulfilling and complete life without regrets."
—Javad Nasrin, Ondu relic hunter

Flashback 3G (You may play this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then remove it from the game.)

metadata.rulesText:
Imprint — When Chrome Mox comes into play, you may remove a nonartifact, nonland card in your hand from the game.
T: Add one mana of any of the imprinted card's colors to your mana pool.

metadata.rulesText:
Haste
Whenever Goblin Guide attacks, defending player reveals the top card of his or her library. If it's a land card, that player puts it into his or her hand.
metadata.flavorText: "I've been all over this world. I even remember some of those places."

metadata.rulesText: Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, you may add one mana of any color to your mana pool.
metadata.flavorText: Its scales contain the essence of thousands of lotus blooms.

metadata.rulesText: Destroy target nonland permanent and all other permanents with the same name as that permanent.
metadata.flavorText: During the collision of the shards, entire ways of life disappeared without a trace.

metadata.rulesText:
Trample
Whenever Primeval Titan enters the battlefield or attacks, you may search your library for up to two land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle your library.

metadata.rulesText:
Whenever Spiritmonger deals damage to a creature, put a +1/+1 counter on Spiritmonger.
B: Regenerate Spiritmonger.
G: Spiritmonger becomes the color of your choice until end of turn.

metadata.rulesText:
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage, put two charge counters on Umezawa's Jitte.
Remove a charge counter from Umezawa's Jitte: Choose one — Equipped creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn; or target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn; or you gain 2 life.
Equip 2

Equip 5
